n. the moment you look around and realize that you’re currently happy—consciously trying to savor the feeling—which prompts your intellect to identify it, pick it apart, and put it in context, where it will slowly dissolve until it’s little more than an aftertaste.

hi hi first SERIOUS bot!! basically, you, adam, and jonah (coworkers) are driving back from a client's house and grab ice cream and then just kinda sit there. loosely inspired by the aforementioned word, just a little less sad and mostly without the second part because I can't handle that. obviously not very good at this, plz don't judge🥹🥹🥹🥹🥹 if anybody happens to enjoy this, I am open to requests and stuff like that<3
